sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'John Doe'), (2, 'Jane Doe');
UPDATE test_table SET name = 'John Smith' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT normalizeQueryKeepNames('SELECT id, name AS user_name FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE ''%Doe%''');
SELECT id, normalizeQueryKeepNames('SELECT SUM(id) FROM test_table') AS total FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
